profiles.name: Связи абонентов (проект)
profiles.description: Данные из project_communications с фильтром по номеру.
profiles.query: SELECT id, abon1, abon2, operator1, operator2, address1, address2, time_start, time_end, calls_count, total_duration, calls_count_approx FROM project_communications WHERE project_id = :project_id AND (:phone = '' OR abon1 = :phone OR abon2 = :phone) ORDER BY time_start DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT :limit

profiles.name: Смены аппаратов (проект)
profiles.description: Данные из project_device_history с фильтром по номеру.
profiles.query: SELECT id, abon, imsi, imei, period_start, period_end FROM project_device_history WHERE project_id = :project_id AND (:phone = '' OR abon = :phone) ORDER BY period_start DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT :limit
